<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward is deadly. To find a safe path to the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn downwards. From facing right to facing down, I need to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is located at row 04 column D. Moving forward leads to a lava cell at row 03 column B, which is deadly. I should turn to face right (`>`), so I can move safely towards the goal by going around the lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B, facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 04, column D. The path to the goal involves moving right and down. Since I am facing left, I need to first turn around to face right (`>`). To do that, I will turn right twice, but I will start by turning right once now.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach the goal, I need to move down. So I have to turn around from facing up to facing down. To do this, I will turn right twice. The next step is to turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me at row 02 column C contains lava (`L`), so moving forward would be deadly. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I should try to navigate around the lava. From my current position and orientation, turning downwards is the best approach. I will turn right to face down (`v`), so I can move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward will take me to a lava cell (row 03, column B is safe, but forward is lava at row 03, column B is '.', so it's safe). I can move forward safely to row 03 column B which is a floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 03, column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward will take me to row 04, column B which is safe (`.`). From there, I can navigate towards the goal. So I will move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 04, column B, facing down (`v`). Moving forward would take me into a wall at row 05, column B, which is not possible. The goal is at row 04, column D. To reach it, I need to face right (`>`). From facing down, I can turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The path from my current position to the goal is clear at column C and column D, both being floor cells and goal at D. I will move forward to progress towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>
